top_insights: Nobody is coming to save you; your leverage starts with that realization.
Self-taught isn't a backup plan; it's the only path to true agency.
Stop journaling for feelings. Journal to audit your leverage and strategy.
Status is a perception game; leverage is the math that actually pays.
Institutions fear the one-person business because it proves they are obsolete.
hook_patterns: Contrarian assertions that challenge common beliefs
Insight-driven statements offering a 'secret' or counter-intuitive truth
Specific, quantifiable proof points (e.g., '$10M revenue', '$130 for 30 mins')
emotional_drivers: Validation (feeling understood or confirmed in one's views)
Empowerment (belief in one's ability to control outcomes)
Status aspiration (desire for the leverage and success signals presented)
emerging_narrative: A shift toward radical self-reliance and skepticism of institutional narratives, where success is defined by individual agency, tangible financial results, and the rejection of 'waiting for rescue' in favor of proactive, often contrarian, action.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Elon’s stance is principled. Trump’s stance is practical. Tech needs Republicans for the present. Republicans need Tech for the future. Drop the tax cuts, cut some pork, get the bill through.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: The smartest people are all self-taught, even if they went to school.

viral_examples.author: naval
viral_examples.text: Panic led to lockdowns. Lockdowns led to fiscal stimulus. Stimulus led to inflation. Inflation led to monetary tightening. Tightening leads to recession. The panic wasn’t free - and the bill is coming due.

viral_examples.author: thedankoe
viral_examples.text: Normalize not having an opinion on things you don’t understand.

viral_examples.author: thedankoe
viral_examples.text: Go on more walks. Walk for no reason. Walk to solve a problem. Walk to blow off steam. Walk to get outside. Walk to listen, read, and learn. Walk to escape distractions. Walk to improve your health. Walk to think. A simple walking habit can change absolutely everything.

Specific, quantifiable proof points (e.g., '$10M revenue', '$130 for 30 mins')
